items.title: Atletico Madrid vs Man Utd in WCL action LIVE!
Hoe Hoefkens juist in cruciale week de rauwe kant van NAC trotseerde
items.summary: Carl Hoefkens (47) staat onder hevige druk bij NAC Breda. De trainer is intern geliefd en wordt door zijn spelersgroep alom geprezen, maar wist in 42 competitiewedstrijden slechts vier keer te winnen. In acute degradatienood moet de volksclub daardoor ook verder durven te kijken dan het tactische gameplan van de passionele Belg. Alleen schiet het daarmee wat op?

items.title: Brentford v Arsenal: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Premier League updates from the 8pm (GMT) kick-off ⚽ Tables | Top scorers | Follow us on Bluesky | Mail Scott Brentford make one change to their starting line-up following the 3-2 win at Newcastle United on Saturday. Yehor Yarmolyuk replaced Jordan Henderson during the second half of that match; he does the same thing from the start tonight. Henderson is on the bench. Arsenal make four changes to their starting XI from the one named for the 3-0 victory over Newcastle last weekend. Viktor Gyökeres, Eberechi Eze, Piero Hincapié and Cristhian Mosquera step up; Gabriel Jesus and Riccardo Calafiori drop to the bench, while William Saliba and Kai Havertz miss out altogether. Bukayo Saka and Martin Ødegaard both begin their journey back from injury on the bench. Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: Frenkie de Jong maakt zich op voor halve finale tegen Atlético
items.summary: Barcelona neemt het donderdagavond om 21.00 uur op in de halve finale van de Copa del Rey tegen Atlético Madrid. Over twee duels hoopt de ploeg van Hansi Flick zich te plaatsen voor de finale. Ook Premier League-koploper Arsenal komt op dat tijdstip in actie. Volg het in deze VI Live.

items.title: FA: Tuchel's new deal not related to Man Utd job
items.summary: Football Association chief executive Mark Bullingham said there are "performance conditions" connected to Thomas Tuchel staying on as England head coach beyond the World Cup.

items.title: Ange: Frank sacking 'fair,' but Spurs lack vision
items.summary: Ange Postecoglou has labelled Thomas Frank's sacking a "fair departure" but sympathised with the Dane for having to work in an "environment of uncertainty."

items.title: Sterling joins Feyenoord after Chelsea exit
items.summary: Raheem Sterling has agreed deal to join Feyenoord until end of season, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Sources: Pereira set to be named new Forest boss
items.summary: Ex-Wolves boss Vitor Pereira has agreed to join Nottingham Forest to replace Sean Dyche, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Ex-West Ham forward Antonio in talks with Charlton
items.summary: Michail Antonio holds initial talks with Charlton Athletic about a possible return to domestic football after his near fatal car crash.

items.title: Who's been fastest and who has most laps at Bahrain test so far?
items.summary: Find out the driver line-ups for the first F1 Bahrain test, who has the best lap times and which teams have completed the most laps so far.

items.title: Nederland treft het met 'makkelijke' Nations League-loting
items.summary: Gekeken naar de FIFA-ranking heeft het Nederlands elftal het getroffen met de Nations League-loting. Oranje werd donderdagavond aan Duitsland, Servië en Griekenland gekoppeld .

items.title: Dit is de volledige groepsindeling van de Nations League
items.summary: Het Nederlands elftal weet sinds donderdagavond waar het aan toe is in de Nations League en dat geldt ook voor de andere landen Europese landen. Voetbal International zet de uitkomst van de gehele loting voor je op een rij.

items.title: Super League 2026 LIVE! Build-up as York Knights take on Hull KR in season opener
Paes kan komend weekend voor Ajax debuteren in de Eredivisie
items.summary: Maarten Paes is speelgerechtigd voor Ajax. De winteraanwinst heeft zijn werkvergunning officieel binnen, zo meldt Ajax Life .

items.title: Footballer Thomas Partey charged with two further counts of rape
items.summary: Villarreal player charged in July with five counts of rape Former Arsenal midfielder denies all the charges The footballer Thomas Partey has been charged with two new counts of rape relating to an additional woman who came forward to police with the allegations in August last year. Partey will appear at Westminster magistrates court on 13 March in relation to the additional charges issued by the Crown Prosecution Service over allegations that date from 2020. Continue reading...

items.title: England to face Spain and Croatia in Nations League
items.summary: England will face Spain, Croatia and the Czech Republic in the 2026-27 Uefa Nations League group stage, while Wales are drawn with holders Portugal.

items.title: 'Motivated' Verstappen airs concerns over new F1 cars
items.summary: Four-time world champion Max Verstappen has insisted he is "motivated" for the new Formula 1 season despite revealing concerns about the sport's new regulations for the 2026 season.

items.title: Manchester United assert ‘inclusive’ values as FA looks into Jim Ratcliffe comments
items.summary: Ratcliffe claimed UK being ‘colonised’ by immigrants United say Manchester a city ‘anyone can call home’ Manchester United took the extraordinary step of publicly asserting their “inclusive and welcoming” values after their co-owner Jim Ratcliffe sparked widespread condemnation with his comments about immigration. In statement that did not name Ratcliffe but clearly referred to his claims that the UK is being “colonised” by immigrants, United affirmed their commitment to “equality, diversity and inclusion” and described Manchester as “a city that anyone can call home”. Continue reading...

items.title: Raheem Sterling joins Feyenoord for rest of season after Chelsea exit
items.summary: Dutch club are managed by Robin van Persie Sterling thinks he can be ‘a valued member of the team’ Raheem Sterling has signed for Feyenoord on a contract until the end of the season. The 31-old winger, capped 82 times by England, has joined as a free agent, having at the end of January terminated his contract at Chelsea – which had 18 months to run. Sterling has not played a competitive game since the final day of last season when he was on loan at Arsenal. He endured a difficult time over the first half of this season when the then Chelsea manager, Enzo Maresca, banished him from the first-team squad. Continue reading...

items.title: Barnet manager Dean Brennan hit with nine-game ban over sexist comments to referee
items.summary: Touchline ban from FA for remarks to Kirsty Dowle Mandatory education and £2,000 fine also imposed Barnet’s manager, Dean Brennan, has been given a nine-match touchline ban by the Football Association after being found guilty of making sexist comments to the referee Kirsty Dowle during a League Two game this season. It was revealed in December that Brennan had been charged with an aggravated breach of FA rule E3.1 for allegedly making offensive remarks to Dowle during Barnet’s defeat by Shrewsbury in September. Continue reading...
